Description: Verify insurance plans can be attached to an in-progress invoice
Preconditions: Patient with active insurance plan; invoice in progress
Steps:
1. Open patient invoice
2. Click 'Add Insurance'
3. Select insurance plan
4. Save
Expected Result: Insurance plan attached; coverage calculated and displayed in summary

Test Case: Multiple insurance plans on single invoice
Description: Verify multiple insurance plans can be added with correct coverage calculation
Steps:
1. Create invoice with items
2. Add first insurance plan
3. Add second insurance plan
4. Review summary
Expected Result: Both plans attached; total coverage is sum of individual coverages

Description: Verify insurance plan can be removed from invoice before finalisation
Steps:
1. Open invoice
2. Click insurance plan
3. Remove plan
4. Confirm
Expected Result: Insurance removed; coverage recalculated to zero

Description: Verify coverage applies only to insurable products
Preconditions: Mix of insurable and non-insurable products
Steps:
1. Add insurable product
2. Add non-insurable product
3. Attach insurance
4. Check coverage
Expected Result: Coverage applies only to insurable items; non-insurable shows no coverage

Description: Verify insurance coverage is snapshotted at finalisation
Steps:
1. Create invoice
2. Add items and insurance
3. Finalise invoice
4. Check InvoiceItemFinalisedInsurance
Expected Result: Insurance coverage persisted in snapshot; cannot be modified after finalisation

Description: Verify full patient payment can be refunded
Steps:
1. Open invoice
2. Navigate to payments
3. Click Refund on payment
4. Confirm full refund
Expected Result: Refund created; patientPaymentStatus changes to UNPAID; original payment marked as refunded

Description: Verify partial refund updates status correctly
Preconditions: Invoice with patient payment > refund amount
Steps: 1. Open invoice payments\n2. Refund partial amount\n3. Check status
Expected Result: patientPaymentStatus shows PARTIAL; balance outstanding updated

Description: Verify insurer payments cannot be refunded
Steps: 1. Open invoice\n2. Try to refund insurer payment
Expected Result: Refund option not available or error shown for insurer payments

Description: Verify double-refund is prevented
Steps: 1. Try to refund a payment that was already refunded
Expected Result: Error message shown; refund blocked

Description: Verify refund payments cannot be refunded
Steps: 1. Try to refund a refund payment
Expected Result: Error or option not available

Description: Verify refunded payments show correct UI indicators
Steps: 1. View payments table
Expected Result: Refunded payment shows strikethrough or 'Refunded' label; refund linked to original

Test Case: Invoice summary with insurance and refunds
Description: Verify summary calculation with complex scenario
Preconditions: Invoice with items insurance payments and refunds
Steps: 1. Create complex invoice scenario\n2. Review summary
Expected Result: patientTotal = items - insurance - discount; patientPaymentsTotal excludes refunds

Test Case: Data table export with datetime context
Description: Verify invoice exports work after datetime context fix (#9350)
Steps: 1. Navigate to invoices\n2. Export to CSV/Excel
Expected Result: Export completes without error; dates formatted correctly

Description: Record a scheduled medication administration as given
Preconditions: Patient with active prescription; MAR grid displayed
Steps:
1. Navigate to MAR view
2. Click on scheduled slot
3. Select 'Given'
4. Complete dose details
Expected Result: MAR status updated to Given; green checkmark displayed; dose recorded

Description: Record a medication as not given with reason
Steps:
1. Click MAR slot
2. Select 'Not Given'
3. Select reason from dropdown
4. Save
Expected Result: Status shows Not Given (X); reason recorded; visible in details

Description: Add multiple doses for split-dose medication
Steps: 1. Record first dose\n2. Add additional dose\n3. Review MAR details
Expected Result: Multiple doses recorded; total dose calculated correctly

Description: Change MAR status from Given to Not Given
Steps: 1. Click Given MAR\n2. Select 'Change Status'\n3. Change to Not Given with reason
Expected Result: Status changed; reason required and recorded; change logged

Description: Change MAR status from Not Given to Given
Steps: 1. Click Not Given MAR\n2. Change status to Given\n3. Enter dose details
Expected Result: Status changed; dose details required; change logged

Description: Modify recorded dose amount
Steps: 1. Open MAR details\n2. Edit dose amount\n3. Save
Expected Result: Dose amount updated; isEdited flag set; change logged

Description: Modify recorded given time
Steps: 1. Open MAR details\n2. Change given time\n3. Save
Expected Result: Time updated; change logged

Description: Remove an extra dose from MAR
Steps: 1. Open MAR details\n2. Remove additional dose\n3. Provide reason
Expected Result: Dose marked as removed; reason recorded; total updated

Description: Verify warning for dose recorded outside scheduled time
Steps: 1. Record dose significantly outside scheduled time
Expected Result: Warning displayed about dose timing discrepancy

Description: Verify warning when recorded dose differs from prescribed
Steps: 1. Record dose different from prescription
Expected Result: Warning displayed about dose mismatch

Description: Verify paused medications cannot be administered
Steps: 1. Navigate to MAR\n2. Try to record paused medication
Expected Result: Recording blocked; appropriate message shown; medication shows strikethrough

Description: Mark a MAR record as an error
Steps: 1. Open MAR details\n2. Mark as error\n3. Enter error notes
Expected Result: isError flag set; error notes saved; visual indicator shown

Description: View history of changes to MAR record
Steps: 1. Open MAR\n2. View changelog
Expected Result: All changes displayed with timestamp and user

Description: Record as-needed PRN medication administration
Steps: 1. Navigate to PRN section\n2. Record administration
Expected Result: PRN administration recorded correctly in separate section

Description: Verify MAR entries created automatically
Steps: 1. Create new prescription\n2. Check MAR grid

Test Case: No new MARs for discontinued prescription
Description: Verify discontinued prescriptions stop generating MARs
Steps: 1. Discontinue prescription\n2. Check MAR
Expected Result: No new MARs generated after discontinuation; existing preserved

Description: Verify sensitive medications respect permissions
Steps: 1. Login without SensitiveMedication permission\n2. View MAR

Description: Send medications from encounter to pharmacy
Steps: 1. Click 'Send to Pharmacy'\n2. Select medications\n3. Enter quantity/repeats

Steps: 1. Open pharmacy modal\n2. Select prescription type

Description: Verify confirmation when recently sent

Description: Verify UUID validation removed from medication zod schema

Steps: 1. Select medications using checkboxes\n2. Enter quantities

Description: Verify quantity is required and positive
Steps: 1. Try to dispense with quantity 0 or empty

Description: Verify instructions are required for selected items
Steps: 1. Select medication\n2. Leave instructions empty\n3. Submit

Description: Verify dispensing clinician is required

Description: Verify review step shows correct label preview

Description: Verify can return to edit from review step

Description: Verify dispense submission triggers print
Steps: 1. Click 'Dispense & Print'

Description: Edit a previously recorded dispense

Description: Cancel a dispensed medication record
Steps: 1. Click Cancel on dispense\n2. Confirm

Description: View details of dispensed medication
Steps: 1. Click dispense row

Description: Print label for already dispensed medication
Steps: 1. Click 'Print label' action

Description: Verify label shows all required information
Steps: 1. Print label\n2. Review content

Description: Verify label respects prescriptionLabelSize setting
Steps: 1. Configure custom width/height\n2. Print label

Description: Verify modal UI hidden in print view

Description: Verify stock status shown when enabled
Steps: 1. Open dispense modal
Expected Result: Stock status column shows current availability

Description: Verify write permission needed for edit/cancel
Steps: 1. Login as read-only user\n2. Try edit/cancel
Expected Result: Edit and Cancel actions not available

Description: Verify sync handles child record before parent
Preconditions: Sync with invoice_payments referencing future parent
Steps: 1. Sync child invoice payment with originalPaymentId\n2. Sync parent
Expected Result: Both records saved correctly; FK constraint satisfied

Description: Verify tasks with parent_task_id sync correctly
Steps: 1. Sync task with parent_task_id before parent
Expected Result: Task saved; parent reference intact after parent syncs

Description: Verify FK violation caught at transaction end
Steps: 1. Sync child only (parent never arrives)
Expected Result: Constraint violation raised at SET CONSTRAINTS IMMEDIATE

Description: Verify error when called outside transaction
Steps: 1. Call withDeferredSyncSafeguards outside transaction
Expected Result: Error thrown about missing transaction

Description: Create new sync session successfully
Steps: 1. POST /sync
Expected Result: Session created; goodToGo response; session ID returned

Description: Verify old sessions closed when device reconnects
Steps: 1. Start session\n2. Disconnect\n3. Reconnect
Expected Result: Old session closed; new session starts

Description: Verify idle sessions cleaned up by StaleSyncSessionCleaner
Steps: 1. Create session\n2. Wait for timeout
Expected Result: Session marked as timed out and cleaned up

Description: Verify maxConcurrentSessions enforced
Steps: 1. Start 4 concurrent sessions\n2. Try 5th
Expected Result: 5th device queued; waits for capacity

Description: Verify numberConcurrentPullSnapshots limits snapshots
Steps: 1. Initiate multiple pulls
Expected Result: Only configured number run concurrently; others wait

Description: Verify no race condition on concurrent session creation
Steps: 1. Send multiple concurrent POST /sync
Expected Result: Only one session created per device; no duplicates

Description: Complete sync: pull then push
Steps:
1. Create session
2. Initiate pull
3. Complete pull
4. Push changes
5. End session
Expected Result: All changes synced correctly both directions

Description: Verify pull waits for snapshot completion
Steps: 1. Initiate pull\n2. Poll pull/ready
Expected Result: Returns ready only after snapshot completes

Description: Verify push waits for persist completion
Steps: 1. Complete push\n2. Poll push/complete
Expected Result: Returns complete only after persist finishes

Description: Verify saveIncomingChanges respects model dependencies
Steps: 1. Push records with dependencies
Expected Result: Records saved in correct order respecting FKs

Description: Verify echoed changes not re-synced
Preconditions: Record pushed and pulled in same session
Steps: 1. Push record\n2. Pull
Expected Result: Pushed record not returned in pull (no echo)

Description: Verify mobile uses SQLite defer_foreign_keys

Description: Verify FacilitySyncManager uses deferred safeguards

Description: Verify unsafe schema disabled by default for mobile
